title: Abyssal Optimized
description: A QOL and Performance focused Vanilla Plus Mod pack.
body:
Abyssal Craft Updates quickly to the latest _major_ Minecraft version so you never have to worry about being left behind.

This is just a small QOL Pack and optimization for anyone to use. It includes some Quality of life improvements "*Removed a lot of the laggyier mods for a smoother experience*".

### Abyssal Craft
![Abyssal Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gxlHFWJj/images/47982ecfdc6865408961db36e18b8d179d6efab9.png)

### Vanilla Minecraft
![Vanilla](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/gxlHFWJj/images/218b4566c697412e22dee8cd8aecfe6d1e6ac9ad.png)

_Images are taken on a mid tier gaming laptop so performance may very greatly_


<details>
<summary>Versioning</summary>
Major version means the latest major release of minecraft example being 1.20 not 1.20.4

Abyssal Craft versions are named as follows. the Minecraft version followed by the version of Abyssal Craft

EX: 1.20.1 67
</details>

1.20.5+ requires Java 21. Update your launcher and [download Java here.](https://adoptium.net/temurin/releases/?version=21&package=jre&arch=x64#version-filter)
